name: Lodor
description: RomM thin-client — whole-library stubs, download-on-launch, two-way save sync
author: lodordev

changelog.0.9.6: Self-update notices (store badge + daily check after a good sync), pairing self-heal for preseeded/cloned cards, Tailscale QR sign-in no longer times out, sync engine 0.9.6 (save-integrity + cross-device Recently Played interop).
changelog.0.9.7: 0.9.7: fleet core alignment (states-portable cores), stale auto-state retirement on restore, Handoff state manifests (dark), engine sync fixes. First release in lockstep with the new Android lane.
changelog.0.9.7.2: 0.9.7.2 — Handoff save-state core alignment (SNES/GBA/etc. now declare the real cores), save-state data-loss fixes, self-update honesty
changelog.0.9.7.3: 0.9.7.3 — Handoff save-state sync end-to-end: Sync Now + daemon now push save-states, on-exit state push decoupled from battery saves, offline queue/drain
changelog.0.9.7.4: 0.9.7.4 — Sync Now now pushes save-states (wired into the real sync paths), on top of the on-exit + offline-queue state sync
changelog.0.9.7.5: 0.9.7.5 — parity/maintenance. Adds an uninstall cleanup hook (post_uninstall) that clears saved server credentials on removal; activates once the pak store runs uninstall hooks. Picks up the current sync engine. No user-facing behavior change on NextUI.
